title: LOCO Diwali Battle/League Stage
wikitext:
{{DISPLAYTITLE: LOCO Diwali Battle: League Stage}} {{Upthrust Esports Navbox}} {{Tabs static |name1=League Stage|link1=LOCO_Diwali_Battle/League_Stage |name2=Grand Finals|link2=LOCO_Diwali_Battle/Grand_Finals |this=1 }} {{Infobox league |game=bgmi |liquipediatier=3 |name=LOCO Diwali Battle: League Stage |icon= |tickername=LOCO Diwali Battle: LS |shortname=LOCO Diwali Battle: LS |image=LOCO Diwali Battle logo.png |type=Online |team_number=27 |series=LOCO Diwali Battle |organizer=Upthrust Esports |organizer-link=http://instagram.com/upthrust_esports/ |sponsor=[https://loco.gg/ LOCO] |mode=squads |prizepoolusd= |perspective=tpp |localcurrency=inr |prizepool=10,00,000 |country=India |sdate=2021-11-01 |edate=2021-11-17 |twitter= |instagram=upthrust_esports |web= |linkedin=company/upthrust-esports |loco=streamers/upthrustesports |discord=zZQMMPeEj7 |facebook= |youtube=c/UPTHRUSTESPORTS }} '''''[http://instagram.com/upthrust_esports/ Upthrust Esports]''''' in association with '''''[https://loco.gg/ LOCO]''''' on the occasion of the festival of lights Diwali present a BGMI tournament called the '''''LOCO Diwali Battle''''' with a prize pool of ₹30,00,000 INR. The League Stage features a prize pool of ₹10,00,000 INR. ==About== ===Broadcast Talent=== {{box|start|padding=1em}} {{broadcasterCard |position= Hindi Commentator |lang=in |b1=RA1|b1flag=in |b1name= |b2=Gamezo Tech|b2flag=in |b2name= }} {{box|end}} ===Format=== '''''LOCO Diwali Battle League Stage:''' 1st November 2021 to 17th October 2021.'' Maps: {{Abbr/TPP}} [[Erangel]] and [[Miramar]] * ''27 Teams divided into 3 groups '' (A, B, and C) * '' 9 Teams in each group'' * ''Teams will compete in a round robin format'' * ''78 Matches to be played over a period of 3 weeks (Each team to play 56 Matches).'' * ''30 Matches to be played over a period of 5 days for Week-1 (24 matches for qualified teams and 12 matches for eliminated teams ).'' * ''Week-1 will feature 27 teams in the qualifiers out of which 20 teams (18 Qualified + 2 Fan Favourite) will move to Week-1 Finals.'' * ''Week-1 Qualifiers will go for 3 days (12 matches per team).'' * ''Week-1 Finals will go for 2 days (12 matches per team) * ''24 Matches to be played over a period of 4 days for both Week 2 & 3 by all 27 teams (Each team to play 16 Matches).'' * ''{{bgcolortext|up|'''Top 18 teams '''}} from the overall standings will advance to [[LOCO_Diwali_Battle/Grand_Finals|Grand Finals]]'' ====Points Distribution==== {| class="wikitable" style="text-align:center;" ! colspan="2"|Points Distribution |- |'''''Finish Points''''' ||''1 per kill'' |- !width=101px|Place !width=101px|Points |- |{{Placement|1}}||15 |- |{{Placement|2}}||12 |- |{{Placement|3}}||10 |- |{{Placement|4}}||8 |- |{{Placement|5}}||6 |- |{{Placement|6}}||4 |- |{{Placement|7}}||2 |- |{{Placement|8-12}}||1 |- |{{Placement|13-18}}||0 |} ==Prize Pool== ₹10,00,000 {{Abbr/INR}} ( $13,485 {{Abbr/USD}} ) are spread among the teams and the players as seen below:
